leadText: Hyper Drill (Japanese: ハイパードリル Hyper Drill) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Dunsparce and Dudunsparce.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Hyper Drill inflicts damage. It bypasses the effects of Protect , Detect , Spiky Shield , King's Shield , Baneful Bunker , Silk Trap , and Burning Bulwark , but does not lift the effects of these moves. Other effects [ edit | edit source ] A Dunsparce that knows this move will evolve into Dudunsparce when leveled up.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.
